idea_ref: [T1.GATE] NLI zero-shot for ST3 basis axis — pe rescue via entailment
hypothesis: ST3 errors are 100% on the basis axis (external vs internal). Only 8 pe training examples exist. NLI zero-shot with DeBERTa-v3-large-mnli can classify basis without fine-tuning: premise=argument text, hypothesis templates for external/internal. If basis accuracy > 80%, combine with perfect goal axis for pe F1 > 0.
